title: Junior Geospatial Engineer
description:
We are seeking an entry-level Geospatial Engineer to build spatial data pipelines.

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in GIS, Geography, or related field
- Experience with Python and PostGIS
- Familiarity with GDAL and geoprocessing workflows
- 0-1 years experience welcome

Preferred:
- AWS experience
- Remote sensing background
